name: Augustus Loop
description: Augustus Loop is a disting NT implementation of one of Expert Sleepers' oldest products, the VST plug-in of the same name. Essentially, it's a tape-inspired stereo delay. The delay time can be dialled in manually, or set by tap tempo or a clock input. The longest delay possible is around 44 seconds. Being a tape delay, you can change the tape speed via CV. Patching an LFO into here is your route to all manner of subtle detuning or extreme mangling effects. You can also stop and reverse the tape. There is an option to run the delay signal through an 'effects loop', allowing you to insert other effects or processing into the guts of the delay. Note that the 'Pitch CV' input changes the tape speed. It is labelled pitch rather than speed to emphasise the fact that it is scaled 1V/octave. There are four 'tape read heads' with independent delay times and stereo positions, allowing for straight stereo delays, ping pong delays, or hybrid multi-tap style effects.

parameters.name: Delay multiplier
parameters.description: A multiplier to apply to the delay time set by the parameters, the tap tempo, or the clock.

parameters.name: Pitch inertia
parameters.description: Sets the amount of 'inertia' or slew on the pitch CV input.

parameters.name: Stop tape
parameters.description: When on, the tape speed is set to zero.

parameters.name: Reverse tape
parameters.description: When on, the tape is reversed.

parameters.name: Bit depth
parameters.description: Controls the bit depth used in the delay memory. Setting this to '0' (16 bit) doubles the maximum delay time.

parameters.name: Inertia free
parameters.description: Enables 'Inertia free' mode, which crossfades between old and new delay times.

parameters.name: Clear loop
parameters.description: When on, instigates a rapid clear of the delay buffer.

parameters.name: Filter type
parameters.description: Sets the filter type (thru, low pass, band pass, high pass).

parameters.name: Saturation
parameters.description: Sets the depth of the saturation effect.

parameters.name: Saturation shape
parameters.description: Controls the shape of the saturation (0=hard digital clipping, 100=soft saturation).

parameters.name: Tap tempo
parameters.description: When this parameter transitions from 0 to 1, the algorithm acts on a tap tempo event.

parameters.name: Clocks required
parameters.description: Sets the number of consistent clocks required to change the delay time.

parameters.name: FX Loop position
parameters.description: Enables the effects loop and sets in position the signal flow (Off, Pre-Filter, Post-Filter).

parameters.name: FX Loop output L
parameters.description: Sets the left output to the effect loop.

parameters.name: FX Loop output R
parameters.description: Sets the right output to the effect loop.

parameters.name: FX Loop input L
parameters.description: Sets the left input from the effects loop.

parameters.name: FX Loop input R
parameters.description: Sets the right input from the effects loop.

input_ports.name: Left Input
input_ports.description: Audio input for the left channel.

input_ports.name: Right Input
input_ports.description: Audio input for the right channel.

input_ports.name: Pitch CV
input_ports.description: CV input to change tape speed, scaled 1V/octave.

input_ports.name: Clock Input
input_ports.description: CV input to set delay time based on clock pulses.

input_ports.name: FX Loop Input L
input_ports.description: Audio return from the external effects loop (Left).

input_ports.name: FX Loop Input R
input_ports.description: Audio return from the external effects loop (Right).

input_ports.name: Pitch CV input
input_ports.description: The CV input to use for pitch.

input_ports.name: Clock input
input_ports.description: The CV input to use as the clock.

input_ports.name: Left input
input_ports.description: Sets the bus for the left input.

input_ports.name: Right input
input_ports.description: Sets the bus for the right input.

output_ports.name: Left Output
output_ports.description: Audio output for the left channel.

output_ports.name: Right Output
output_ports.description: Audio output for the right channel.

output_ports.name: FX Loop Output L
output_ports.description: Audio send to the external effects loop (Left).

output_ports.name: FX Loop Output R
output_ports.description: Audio send to the external effects loop (Right).

output_ports.name: Left output
output_ports.description: Sets the bus for the left output.

output_ports.name: Right output
output_ports.description: Sets the bus for the right output.
